mapper.select: SELECT timezone, default_reminder_minutes AS defaultReminderMinutes, notify_enabled AS notifyEnabled, voice_retention AS voiceRetention FROM `user` WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE `user`
timezone = #{settings.timezone},
default_reminder_minutes = #{settings.defaultReminderMinutes},
notify_enabled = #{settings.notifyEnabled}, voice_retention = #{settings.voiceRetention}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{userId}
